channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Bins Outside 153 Granville Road, NW6 5AR, 5th May
item.description:
Bin is OVER FLOWING with Rubbish , also on the Floor. Needs CLEANING and CLEARING ASAP

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Granville Road, London
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Fly-tip Large - More than a van load

item.title: Granville Road, NW6 5AR, 5th May
item.description:
The Street Needs Sweeping ALOT of LITTER and RUBBISH SCATTERED.Makes the Street Look MESSY. Also Outside 151 Tabot Centre Nursery School and Outside 149 Granville Road NW6, Litter Thrown Near Tree.
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Granville Road, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Outside 153 Granville Road NW6 5AR, 5th May
item.description:
Wardrobes, Drawers, Furniture. NEEDS Removing as soon as Possible

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Granville Road, London
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Fly-tip Large - More than a van load

item.title: Lime bike left in the Blyth Road estate, 5th May
item.description:
Please remove the bike left in this estate.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Shortlands, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Anti social behaviour / safety issues, 5th May
item.description:
I would like to report an ongoing safety concern in a local park area. There are clear signs in this space stating that ball games are not allowed. However, children are regularly playing with balls in this area while accompany. This has become dangerous
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Malpas Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Another abandoned Vehicle - 4 months, 5th May
item.description:
Another abandoned vehicle dumped on this estate. Not been moved in over 4 months. Owner not known. Blocking parking for homeowners. Clearly abandoned as seen by growing 'crud' all over it. Bit of old carpet mat under front kerb-side wheel. (Has current tax and MOT'd, so possibly stolen and dumped?).

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Tarnwood Park, Mottingham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Abandoned Car - Over 6 Months, 5th May
item.description:
Car has been seen in this condition in various parts of this estate for a year. Now finally abandoned here. It's causing an obstruction and taking up parking space as well as an eyesore. Not roadworthy, not taxed, not insured. NOT LEGAL.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Tarnwood Park, Mottingham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: 2 x fast gas canisters on the pavement, 5th May
item.description:
2 x Fast gas canisters on the pavement under the hedge on the Green Lane side of 35 Albany Rd
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Albany Road, Chislehurst, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Young Tree Needs Attention, 4th May
item.description:
Tree is leaning and needs re-staking

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Euston Road, Fitzrovia, Greater London

item.title: Assorted rubbish dumped on road and footway., 4th May
item.description:

item.title: Bags of builder waste, near railings, 4th May
item.description:
This waste has been there for around a year and appears to be dumped. There is also a large pile of soil further back and some bags of building material, but these have only been there for a couple of weeks so not clear if this is fly-tipping or if it will be collected at some point.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Sinclair Place, Brockley, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Street lamp Constantly flashing on and iff, 4th May
item.description:
Flashing on and off all night outside my bedroom window, previously reported twice and notified as fixed, which it has not been.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Kingswood Road, Shortlands, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Public lamp got damage due to the wind, 4th May
item.description:
Due to the wind the lamp has overturn and directed to my Apartment complex.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Queens Road, Plaistow, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: All street lights on Brooks Way are off, 4th May
item.description:
All the street lights from Brooks Way path through to Main Road are off. People cannot walk through at night as it's not lit up and not safe.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Brook Way, St Paul's Cray, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.description:
Chair has been dumped on the street.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): St Asaph Road, Nunhead, Greater London
